title: Compress the Northwind read to an IC one-pager
guidance: Reward the version that leads with the answer and would help a partner reach a call; tone should read partner-grade. Penalise even coverage with no verdict.

parts.label: Headline
parts.note: one bold line, states the call

runner_input.instruction: Compress the material below into an IC one-pager: lead with the answer, then what changes the decision.
runner_input.constraints: Output: markdown — one bold title line, then exactly three bullets.

source_blocks.text: Northwind is a UK payments-infrastructure provider (acquiring + gateway) serving mid-market merchants. PE buyout under review. Synthetic.

items: Direct scheme connections (Visa/Mastercard) — multi-year to replicate
Fraud model trained on 5 years of proprietary transaction data

source_blocks.text: Northwind runs a real-time fraud-scoring model that cut merchant chargebacks 22% in pilot; it is a genuine ML system, not a rules engine, though the team is small.

Top-5 merchants represent 41% of processed volume — material concentration, and two are on rolling annual contracts. A pending interchange-regulation review could compress the take rate by 3–5bps across the book. The core ledger is maintained by a single staff engineer with no documented succession — key-person risk.

rubric_notes: Verdict: attractive franchise, proceed conditional on merchant diversification + ledger succession.
